roa.docketEntryComment: Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
Court Orders Bench Warrant Permanently Stayed
CONFIDENTIAL DA SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO DETAIN/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:FRANCISCO PLATERO-ESTRADA/SAORD4: 100 YARDS/SAORD2/SAORD/X:FUTURE COURT DATE CONFIRMED/

/CAL: I&A AND PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/TE:1 HOUR/LDPX:6-23-22/X: COURT ESTABLISHES 60TH DAY AS 08-08-22/NB/CONTD: MOTION TO DETAIN, PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:ALEXANDRIA CARL/NB/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL 06-09-22 IN DEPT 9/TWA/DOP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HERAING/NTW60/LDPX: 08-08-22 (60TH)/CONTD: TO SET 0R DISPO 07-13-22 IN DEPT 9/DOP/
